title: SimplyCreate
description: Simply Create is a Simplistic Modpack Focusing on The Create Mod and some Quality of Life Features!
body:
# 🌿 **Simply Create** - A Vanilla+ Modpack

 

## 📜 **Overview**

Do you love **vanilla Minecraft** but wish it had just a bit more depth and polish? **Simply Create** is a **lightweight, performance-friendly** modpack designed to **enhance the vanilla experience** without overwhelming players with drastic changes.

This pack keeps the **core gameplay** of Minecraft intact while adding the **Create mod**, bringing mechanical innovation to your builds. Alongside it, carefully selected **quality-of-life** and **visual enhancement** mods refine the experience—making the game feel **smoother, more immersive, and more beautiful** without changing its essence.

No complex tech trees, no drastic overhauls—just **pure Minecraft**, with a **mechanical and visual glow-up**.

## 🔧 **Key Features:**

### ⚙️ **Create Mod - A New Way to Build**

The **Create** mod is the heart of this modpack, allowing players to:

*   Design **complex mechanical contraptions** using gears, belts, and pistons.
*   Build **functional factories** with windmills, water wheels, and steam engines.
*   Automate farming, mining, and crafting **without breaking immersion**.
*   Use **aesthetically pleasing** building blocks and decorations to enhance any project.

Whether you want to build a **fully automated wheat farm**, a **train system**, or just some **cool moving doors**, **Create** lets you do it all—while still feeling like classic Minecraft.

### 🖼️ **Visual & Immersion Enhancements**

Minecraft’s charm remains intact, but it gets a **subtle but noticeable glow-up** with:

*   **Improved Lighting & Shadows** – Better ambiance without heavy shaders.
*   **Enhanced Block & Item Details** – Small tweaks to textures and models for a **cleaner look**.
*   **Better Animations** – Smoother character movement and interactions.

Everything is **performance-friendly**, ensuring the game runs smoothly without sacrificing beauty.

### 🛠️ **Quality-of-Life Improvements**

A selection of hand-picked **QoL mods** make gameplay more enjoyable without making it feel modded:

*   **Better Inventory Management** – Organize your chests and items more efficiently.
*   **Minor UI Improvements** – Cleaner menus and small tweaks to make things smoother.
*   **Optimized Performance** – Small tweaks that help Minecraft run better without major FPS drops.
*   **Accessibility Improvements** – Subtle additions that make gameplay easier without changing core mechanics.

### 🌎 **Performance-Friendly & Multiplayer Ready**

*   Designed to **run smoothly** on most setups, even lower-end PCs.
*   Works **seamlessly in multiplayer**, perfect for small servers and co-op worlds.
*   No unnecessary bloat—**just the essentials** for a refined experience.
